operation.name: copyPtr_at_dmamove_fetch_ring
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_buf_size () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (bvule  (bvmul  (_ bv24 64) ((_ zero_extend 32)  (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv7 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv6 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv5 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv4 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_buf_size (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
